ns0:entry.ns0:title: Zen4-bit/Proxima
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Zen4-bit/Proxima

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decolua/9router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decolua/9router
Language: javascript
🆓 Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: projectdiscovery/nuclei-templates
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei-templates
Language: javascript
Community curated list of templates for the nuclei engine to find security vulnerabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: songquanpeng/one-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/songquanpeng/one-api
Language: javascript
LLM API 管理 & 分发系统，支持 OpenAI、Azure、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、字节豆包、ChatGLM、文心一言、讯飞星火、通义千问、360 智脑、腾讯混元等主流模型，统一 API 适配，可用于 key 管理与二次分发。单可执行文件，提供 Docker 镜像，一键部署，开箱即用。LLM API management & key redistribution system, unifying multiple providers under a single API. Single binary, Docker-ready, with an English UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xifangczy/cat-catch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xifangczy/cat-catch
Language: javascript
猫抓 浏览器资源嗅探扩展 / cat-catch Browser Resource Sniffing Extension
